key.name: icon-size
key.summary: Icon size multiplier passed to DiagonalBlade

key.name: card-width
key.summary: Width of each card in pixels

key.name: card-height
key.summary: Height of each card in pixels

key.name: card-gap
key.summary: Horizontal gap between cards in pixels

key.name: skew
key.summary: Horizontal skew amount for the diagonal blade shape

key.name: y-offset
key.summary: Vertical offset as percentage of monitor height (-50 to 50)

key.name: text-size
key.summary: App name font size in the card

key.name: text-bottom-pad
key.summary: App name bottom padding in pixels

key.name: show-app-name
key.summary: Show app name on focused card

key.name: stagger-gap-ms
key.summary: Delay between each card appearing during entry (ms)

key.name: focus-duration-ms
key.summary: Duration of the focus transition animation (ms)

key.name: focus-scale
key.summary: Scale of focused card as percentage (100 = no scale)

key.name: peek-enabled
key.summary: Enable window peek preview on focus

key.name: peek-max-scale
key.summary: Maximum size of peek preview as percentage of monitor
